---
title: "Chromebook Data Science"
description: |
  As compute power becomes more commoditized and data professionals are working 
  with larger and larger datasets, it becomes more and more convenient to 
  siwtch even your personal data science setup to the cloud, and therefore
  be able to use a Chrome OS laptop to both increase focus and productivity.
author:
  - name: TJ Palanca
    url: https://www.twitter.com/tjpalanca
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
categories:
  - Chrome OS
  - Data Science
---
